name: trapline
description: Trapline — community ISP service-quality monitor. Checks your line on a regular schedule and builds evidence-grade reports.
author: l-small-tech

scripts.typecheck: npm run typecheck -w server && npm run typecheck -w web
scripts.dev: TRAPLINE_PORT=8732 concurrently -k -n server,web -c blue,green "npm run dev -w server" "npm run dev -w web"
